title: Question About Asuka at the End of EoE
display_title: Question About Asuka at the End of EoE
wikitext:
[]: Question About Asuka at the End of EoE             Quote Post by Raian-kun » Wed Sep 30, 2009 3:59 am So... this is probably a stupid question, but I wasn't totally sure so I thought I'd just ask... did Shinji actually kill Asuka or does she survive? And what are your interpretations of her final line "I feel disgusting"?

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Wed Sep 30, 2009 4:29 am He seemed to stop choking her after she said that, and she didn't look dead yet. And dude, she just got eaten by Evangelions then regurgitated on a beach of a sea of blood. I'd feel disgusting too.

[]:             Quote Post by AyrYntake » Wed Sep 30, 2009 6:24 am The beauty (is this even an applicable word?) of that final line is that it's so open to interpretation.

[]:             Quote Post by Raian-kun » Wed Sep 30, 2009 6:51 am AyrYntake wrote: The beauty (is this even an applicable word?) of that final line is that it's so open to interpretation.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed Sep 30, 2009 7:44 am Raian-kun wrote: So you think it's possible she died?

[]:             Quote Post by Raian-kun » Wed Sep 30, 2009 7:54 am Sachi wrote: Raian-kun wrote: So you think it's possible she died?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Sep 30, 2009 11:44 am Simple really... Shinji is just doing what he thought Asuka would want, given her last recorded communication with him “But, if I have to be with you, I'd rather die!”. She indicates her fond approval that he has remembered. He bottles. She reacts with disgust. Given what last happened to her in the physical world, she is now bereaved, and her raison d'être (being a — the — EVA pilot) taken from her, everything gone that awoke her from her previous suicidal state, and having suffered the harrowing of Complementation, I don't think that this is at all unlikely a possibility. At that point, his act becomes one of twisted love, the sort of thing his Dad would be proud of.

[]:             Quote Post by Merridian » Wed Sep 30, 2009 12:36 pm Mr. Tines wrote: Given what last happened to her in the physical world, she is now bereaved, and her raison d'être (being a — the — EVA pilot) taken from her, everything gone that awoke her from her previous suicidal state, and having suffered the harrowing of Complementation, I don't think that this is at all unlikely a possibility.

[]:             Quote Post by Lucretius » Wed Sep 30, 2009 2:35 pm To me, the strangling seems like it's simply a continuation of the kitchen scene. Shinji temporarily forgets all of his epiphanies upon seeing the girl who drove him to Tang the world in the first place.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Sep 30, 2009 3:23 pm Lucretius wrote: To me, the strangling seems like it's simply a continuation of the kitchen scene.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Sep 30, 2009 4:28 pm Lucretius wrote: To me, the strangling seems like it's simply a continuation of the kitchen scene. Shinji temporarily forgets all of his epiphanies upon seeing the girl who drove him to Tang the world in the first place.

[]:             Quote Post by VoidEater » Wed Sep 30, 2009 4:30 pm @Mr. TInes: Nicely said. Also @SSD. I don't think she died. Wouldn't make much of a story climax.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Sep 30, 2009 4:34 pm Heh, thanks. Asuka dying wouldn't make much sense considering she was able to deliver her line as well as what the script says (I can't access it right now, but it's Scene 12 from M26' on http://www.evacommentary.org )

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Wed Sep 30, 2009 5:02 pm Clearly, Asuka never came back to life. Shinji hallucinated the whole thing. Then he had dream sex with her dream corpse.

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Wed Sep 30, 2009 6:55 pm ~Disgust at Shinji crying over her like in the opening scene (NOT because of his fapping contrary to what the Miyumura interview says. After all, Asuka had no problem with Shinji doing that during as the train-car talk reveals...If it WAS Anno's intent for Asuka to be upset over Shinji's fapping, then I gotta say "lolwtf, Anno").

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Sep 30, 2009 7:03 pm I was referring to the same interview as you in my post. I mean, yeah sShinji's fapping could be a factor: even though Asuka in the train-car seriously said "Do it again like always, I'll stand here and watch" she could be partly disgusted at the thought of Shinji using her that way. It's just it seems kind of silly to think that's part of the reason of Asuka's disgust in the final scene since she DIDN'T have a problem with it according to pre-Instrumentality, but obviously people aren't always going to be honest with their feelings all the time if that makes any sense.

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Wed Sep 30, 2009 7:06 pm I can totally see her lying; trying to SHAME Shinji for what he'd done. It's very Asuka.

[]:             Quote Post by Lucretius » Wed Sep 30, 2009 7:08 pm The interview explains how Anno came up with the line, but that doesn't mean it's a valid in-universe explanation. If that makes sense. re the train car bit: Asuka's dejected look in the kitchen scene suggests she really did expect a response...

[]:             Quote Post by Mongoosedog » Wed Sep 30, 2009 9:31 pm the first time i saw EoE i i had the sound low on the TV and i didn't here Asuka's final line so i thought Shinji killed her. But soon after i realised she's definately not dead, seeing as her final line comes after Shinji stops strangling her. and Mr. Tines and SSD those were some amazing responses, i'd never looked at it that way before

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Wed Sep 30, 2009 10:06 pm I think it's some combination of a reaction to Shinji's actions and perceiving her own lingering need for him. I think it works with or without suicidal overtones.
summary:
[]: Question About Asuka at the End of EoE             Quote Post by Raian-kun » Wed Sep 30, 2009 3:59 am So... this is probably a stupid question, but I wasn't totally sure so I thought I'd just ask... did Shinji actually kill Asuka or does she survive? And what are your interpretations of her final line "I feel disgusting"?

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight &raq
